qa_pairs.question: What causes valuable quota space to be consumed by STAR-CCM+ jobs?
qa_pairs.answer: Temporary output files from STAR-CCM+ job runs may accumulate in hidden directories named `~/.star-version_number`, consuming valuable quota space.

qa_pairs.question: How can users remove temporary STAR-CCM+ files that are consuming quota space?
qa_pairs.answer: These files can be removed by periodically running `rm -ri ~/.starccm*` and replying yes when prompted.
